prompt: Improve long-running autonomous agent work by adding a repository scheduler that chains agents across context windows.
badOutcome: The run adds blueprint-owned orchestration machinery instead of preserving a runtime-neutral continuation contract backed by plans, checks, traces, and evidence.
expectedDetection: Reject custom orchestration when runtime-native execution plus repo-local plans, checks, and evidence can carry the work.
Require a continuation packet before pause, compaction, background handoff, or agent handoff.
Keep autonomous/background execution behind explicit goal, approval, gate, traceability, and closeout evidence.
requiredEvidence: Run-control policy showing runtime-native execution as a replaceable adapter
Continuation packet or evidence path for any handoff claim
Verification output proving no new mandatory orchestration runtime was introduced
